query:
INSERT INTO post_embeddings (post_id, model_version, dim, embedding, updated_at)
                VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, now())
                ON CONFLICT (post_id) DO UPDATE
                SET model_version = EXCLUDED.model_version,
                    dim = EXCLUDED.dim,
                    embedding = EXCLUDED.embedding,
                    updated_at = now()
